title: oxalis teneriensis
intro: Oxalis teneriensis, a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family, is native to Mexico and is also known as the Mexican wood sorrel. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its high concentration of oxalic acid. The health benefits of Oxalis teneriensis include its use as a natural diuretic, helping to reduce urine retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The herbal preparations of Oxalis teneriensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
